text.title: Zod Schema Validation
text.summary: Zod schema definition, TypeScript type inference from schemas, and safe/unsafe parse patterns for runtime boundary validation.

section.title: Schema Definition and Type Inference

rule.statement: Derive TypeScript types from Zod schemas with z.infer rather than defining a separate interface.
rule.rationale: Keeping the schema as the single source of truth prevents drift between the runtime validator and the static type.

section.reference: Zod UserSchema with inferred types and validation helpers

rule.statement: Use safeParse at API boundaries and parse inside trusted service layers.
rule.rationale: safeParse returns a Result-like object that avoids exception handling at every call site; parse is appropriate when invalid data is a programming error, not a user error.
